description.p: Most radio apps make you search for stations by name or paste in a stream URL. Receiver ships with over 30,000 stations ready to explore — each one individually scanned and verified, with duplicates removed and logos fetched in proper resolution. Just open the app and start discovering.
No sign-up. No ads. No popularity rankings deciding what you hear. Just radio.

ul.li: 30,000+ curated stations — deduplicated, scanned, and verified
High-quality logos for a clean browsing experience
Browse and search by tags, country, or language
Save your favourite stations for quick access
MP3, AAC, Ogg, and HLS stream support
MPRIS integration — control playback from your desktop
Last.fm scrobbling — track what you listen to
Session persistence — resume where you left off
Translated into 120 languages
Add station info page with detailed stream metadata
Add drag-and-drop reordering for favourite stations
Add persistent window dimensions
Add Last.fm profile link in header bar
Migrate history page to ListView with ListModel
Remove featured stations carousel
Delegate HLS stream handling to GStreamer
Improve locale-based local station discovery
Improve East Asian charset detection in stream metadata
Add song history page with relative timestamps
Add About dialog with version info
Add hamburger menu with Last.fm actions and Featured toggle
Add dedicated download button widget with progress feedback
Improve metadata cleaning: underscores, ampersands, and parentheses
Fix audio-only playback volume and video fakesink handling
Update translations for all 126 languages
Fix YouTube stream downloads
Make station name clickable to open its homepage
Improve metadata cleaning for DJ suffixes and title prefixes
Add Last.fm scrobbling support
Normalize Unicode dashes in metadata extraction
Bundle GIO modules for TLS and proxy support in AppImage
Add MPRIS next/previous actions to cycle through favourite stations
Fix AppImage library loading
Fix ICY stream metadata encoding for Central/Eastern European languages
Strip encoding artifacts from non-Latin scripts in station metadata
Add toggle to hide/show Featured Stations on the home screen
Add HLS master playlist resolution for .m3u8 streams
Add AppImage packaging support
Fix locale fallback and standardize language codes
Harden Flatpak sandbox by using app ID for MPRIS bus name
Remove unnecessary D-Bus own-name permission
Drop gstreamer-plugins-ugly from Debian recommends
Add Snap packaging support
Persist download directory using GSettings

description.p: Massive translation update! Added translations for 138 languages covering:

ul.li: Germanic, Romance, Slavic, and Celtic language families
Turkic, Caucasian, and Central Asian languages
Arabic script, Semitic, and Iranian languages
South and Southeast Asian languages
European languages including Greek, Finnish, Estonian, Basque, and Albanian

description.p: Fix GResource loading in installed builds and prepare for Flathub submission.

ul.li: Station browsing and search
Favourites management
Beautiful native GNOME interface
